sql.age_histogram: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(DATE '1998-12-31', c.birth_date)) < 30 THEN '<30' WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(DATE '1998-12-31', c.birth_date)) < 45 THEN '30-44' WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(DATE '1998-12-31', c.birth_date)) < 60 THEN '45-59' ELSE '60+' END AS age_band, COUNT(c.client_id) AS client_count FROM client c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.gender_breakdown: SELECT c.gender, COUNT(c.client_id) AS client_count FROM client c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.age_vs_loan_size: SELECT c.client_id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(DATE '1998-12-31', c.birth_date)) AS age_years, l.amount AS loan_amount FROM client c JOIN disp dp ON dp.client_id = c.client_id JOIN loan l ON l.account_id = dp.account_id;
sql.top_districts_by_client_count: SELECT d."A2" AS district, COUNT(c.client_id) AS client_count FROM district d JOIN client c ON c.district_id = d.district_id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY client_count DESC LIMIT 10;

filters: clients linked to loans through disp.account_id

chart_spec.layout_intent: demographic distributions on top, loan scatter and district ranking below
